name: Denki
short_description: Dundee studio behind Autonauts and a long line of playful, accessible games — from handheld classics to browser experiments.
about: Denki Ltd. is a British video game developer based in Dundee, Scotland. It was founded in 2000 by Colin Anderson and Sean Griffiths, both formerly of DMA Design. The studio has produced original IP across PC, console, and mobile — including the BAFTA-winning colony sim Autonauts (2019) and its follow-up Autonauts vs Piratebots — alongside puzzle titles such as Denki Blocks! and Quarrel, and many games for television and browser.
